strengths: Hands-on experience contributing to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing early but real exposure to the tooling layer relevant to the role.
Demonstrated distributed-systems and high-throughput backend work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, including low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Consistent software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD) across multiple roles, signaling strong engineering fundamentals.
concerns: No executive or people-leadership experience at any level — the resume shows no team management, org scaling, or technical leadership accountability, which are core to this CTO role.
Fintech exposure is shallow: one role at RIDE Capital (investment tooling) with no evidence of credit systems, payment flows, real-time risk, or regulatory compliance work.
AI/agent work appears to be tooling and framework contributions rather than production multi-agent systems with financial or operational consequences — does not meet the hard requirement.
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically capable individual contributor with genuine breadth across backend systems, distributed infrastructure, and emerging agentic tooling, but he does not meet the minimum bar for this CTO role on two of its hardest requirements: he has never led or scaled an engineering organization, and his AI work does not yet constitute production multi-agent systems operating under financial or regulatory stakes. The gap between Staff Software Engineer and executive technical leadership is substantial and not bridged by the resume as presented.
